edges.title: AI-enabled FIMI: capability layer update — agentic autonomous narrative attacks confirmed
edges.rationale: EEAS 4th FIMI Report (10 March) and Blackbird.AI RAV3N confirm the transition from AI-assisted to AI-autonomous narrative attack operations. The AI Governance Monitor’s capability layer (agentic AI autonomous breach documented by Anthropic, Sep 2025; applied to narrative operations Feb 2026) directly feeds the FIMI monitor’s actor and campaign tracking.

edges.title: Military AI procurement two-tier market + autonomous weapons governance vacuum

edges.title: EU AI Act Omnibus 28 April trilogue target: European AI regulatory sovereignty at a deadline
edges.rationale: The Omnibus trilogue (opened 26 March; target 28 April agreement) is a European strategic autonomy event as much as a compliance event. The AI Act is Europe’s primary instrument for asserting AI governance sovereignty; the Omnibus is the mechanism for making that instrument workable. The EU AI Act Omnibus and the Standards Vacuum we track in M09 are directly relevant to the European Strategic Auto…

edges.title: F2-adjacent — False-flag seeding risk
edges.rationale: SAF and RSF attributing drone strikes to each other without forensic corroboration in tight time windows. Pattern consistent with mutual false-flag seeding for domestic legitimation. Flag for FIMI assessment.

edges.title: F4 — Premature De-escalation
edges.rationale: Ceasefire and disarmament progress claims sourced from Israeli/US officials (T3). Hamas disarmament plan not independently verified. Scored at verified level.

edges.title: European theatre — Spring offensive staging
edges.rationale: Russian mechanised assault increase since 17 March. ISW assesses Spring-Summer 2026 offensive preparation. EGHTM should assess NATO eastern flank readiness and air defence allocation implications.

edges.title: Climate/water displacement driver
edges.rationale: Sudan 12M+ displacement includes conflict and climate/food-insecurity drivers. Famine in Darfur/Kordofan partly climate-aggravated. GERP should assess as compound crisis case.

edges.title: Resource conflict financing — coltan/cobalt
edges.rationale: M23/Rwanda control of Rubaya coltan mine. FARDC operations targeting Rubaya explicitly. US-DRC strategic minerals partnership (Washington Accords) links conflict zone to critical supply chain.
